title: Better Emotes BTA
description: ʙᴇᴛᴛᴇʀ ᴇᴍᴏᴛᴇꜱ allows you to insert unique emote unicode characters.
body:
## Better Emotes

ʙᴇᴛᴛᴇʀ ᴇᴍᴏᴛᴇꜱ allows you to insert unique emotes & characters.

Made for BTA! babric.

» Emote selector expanded ☑

» No auto-close on select ☑

» Easily access emotes ✎

» Client side ☮

» Configurable ♬

![The emote selector is opened and shows quickly inserting multiple unique unicode characters.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e630df418106944b917bf8bbb1abc5e520b4fa9.gif)

### Default config file

```
[Recommended]
	#  
	# Clean emotes that fit in nicely along vanilla ones.
	# § ☼ ☹ ⚠ ☮ ☯ ⚔ ⚓ ☔ ☄ ☃ ❣ ✎ ⛈ ☆ ★ ⯪ ⯫ ☜ ☞ (sword) (bow) (axe) (trident) (fishing rod) (potion) ⚗ ⚥ ✘ ☐ ☑ ☒
	#  
	Cute = true
	#  
	# Six dice faces and alternative suits.
	#  ⚀ ⚁ ⚂ ⚃ ⚄ ⚅ ♤ ♧ ♡ ♢
	#  
	Casino = true
	#  
	# Extra punctuation marks for serious writers!
	# ‼ ¡ ⸵ ⸮ ¶ « » ◦ ⋆
	#  
	Punctuation = true
	#  
	# Impressively stout and readable font, good for nicknames!
	# ᴀ ʙ ᴄ ᴅ ᴇ ꜰ ɢ ʜ ɪ ᴊ ᴋ ʟ ᴍ ɴ ᴏ ᴘ ꞯ ʀ ꜱ ᴛ ᴜ ᴠ ᴡ ʏ ᴢ
	#  
	BoldLetters = true
	#  
	# Ditto on the numbers.
	#  ₀ ₁ ₂ ₃ ₄ ₅ ₆ ₇ ₈ ₉
	#  
	BoldNumbers = true
	#  
	# Copyright and trademark symbols for legal documents.
	#  ® © ™ ℗ ʬ ⛨ (shield)
	#  
	Symbols = true
	#  
	# Nifty arrows for pointing things out.
	#  ↕ ↨  ↔ ⇒ ⇏ ⇔ ⇵ ⇄ 
	Arrows = true
	#  
	# Finally, music written entirely in BTA!
	#  ♩ ♬ ♭ ♯ ♮
	MusicalNotation = true
	#  
	# Various shapes good for crafting elaborately decorated messages.
	# ⌂ • ◘ ○ ◙ ■ ● □ △ ▷ ▽ ◁ ► ◄ ▲ ▼ ◆ ◇ ◎ ∟
	#  
	Shapes = false

# False by default due to largely cluttering the menu.
# Still lots of fun emotes!
[Extras]
	#  † ⸸ ‡ ⹋
	Religious = false
	#  α β Γ π Σ σ μ τ Φ Θ Ω δ ∞ ∅ ∈ ∩
	GreekLetters = false
	#  ⏏ ⏩ ⏪ ⏭ ⏮ ⏯ ⏴ ⏵ ⏶ ⏷ ⏸ ⏹ ⏺ ⏻ ⏼ ⏽ ⭘ ▶ ◀
	MediaControls = false
	#  Ⓐ Ⓑ Ⓒ Ⓓ Ⓔ Ⓕ Ⓖ Ⓗ Ⓘ Ⓙ Ⓚ Ⓛ Ⓜ Ⓝ Ⓞ Ⓟ Ⓠ Ⓡ Ⓢ Ⓣ Ⓤ Ⓥ Ⓦ Ⓧ Ⓨ Ⓩ ⓐ ⓑ ⓒ ⓓ ⓔ ⓕ ⓖ ⓗ ⓘ ⓙ ⓚ ⓛ ⓜ ⓝ ⓞ ⓟ ⓠ ⓡ ⓢ ⓣ ⓤ ⓥ ⓦ ⓧ ⓨ ⓩ
	EncircledLetters = false
	#  ⓪ ① ② ③ ④ ⑤ ⑥ ⑦ ⑧ ⑨ ⑩ ⑪ ⑫ ⑬ ⑭ ⑮ ⑯ ⑰ ⑱ ⑲ ⑳
	EncircledNumbers = false
	#  ░ ▒ ▓ █ │ ┤ ┐ └ ┴ ┬ ├ ─ ┼ ┘ ┌ ║ ╢ ╗ ╚ ╩ ╦ ╠ ═ ╬ ╝ ╔ ╡ ╕ ╘ ╧ ╤ ╞ ╧ ╪ ╜ ╓ █ ▄ ▌ ▐ ▀
	BoxDrawing = false
	#  ° ⅛ ⅜ ⅝ ⅞ ⅝ ⅔ ½ ¼ ⅐ ⅑ ⅕ ⅖ ⅗ ⅙ ⅚ ⅟ ↉ ∓ − ≡ ± ≥ ≤ ⌠ ⌡ ÷ ≈ √ ⁿ ⁰ ¹ ² ³ ⁴ ⁵ ⁶ ⁷ ⁸ ⁹
	Mathematics = false
	#                              
	StandardGalaticAlphabet = false```
